title: Blue Crits
description: Makes your crits blue. Find other colors in my profile.
body:
![the blue crit particle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/40bdda75b3a258c7dd28cb178f86fbe327310a80.png)
Makes your crit particles blue.
Great for PvP, and just normal gameplay.
![the blue crit particle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/40bdda75b3a258c7dd28cb178f86fbe327310a80.png)

## Showcase

![Sheep getting crit with blue critical particles in a swamp](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/86208ba1d52c25384d5efe37630c251f500b6960.png)
